'''Pelgrin''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. Over [[2,000,000 BBY|two million]] years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], an indigenous [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Pelgrin (species)|Pelgrin]], built [[The Oracle (Pelgrin)|the Oracle]] on the planet, a merging of technology and [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. The Pelgrin went extinct, leaving many mysterious ruins and artifacts.

Legend had it that over [[25,000 BBY/Legends|twenty-five thousand years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] visited the planet and the Oracle. Around [[3000 BBY]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Ermin Phin-Mar]] and [[Shannur Darkstar]] studied the Oracle after the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] detected a tremor in the Force emanating from Pelgrin.

Following this expedition, the world was given to the Jedi by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]], over the objections of interested [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologists]]. Sometime after [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], a band of [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] attacked Pelgrin and massacred the [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] and Jedi residing there.

{{Planet-stub}}
